children.heading: State development plan
children.label: a State development plan
children.text: In accordance with policies established by the Authority, each State member shall submit a development plan for the area of the region represented by the State member.

children.heading: Content of plan
children.label: b Content of plan
children.text: A State development plan submitted under subsection (a) shall reflect the goals, objectives, and priorities identified in the regional development plan developed under .section 2009bb–1(d)(2) of this title

children.heading: Consultation with interested local parties
children.label: c Consultation with interested local parties
A
children.text: multistate, regional, and local development districts and organizations; and
take into consideration the goals, objectives, priorities, and recommendations of the entities described in paragraph (1).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Authority and applicable multistate, regional, and local development districts and organizations shall encourage and assist, to the maximum extent practicable, public participation in the development, revision, and implementation of all plans and programs under this subchapter.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: 2 Regulations
children.text: The Authority shall develop guidelines for providing public participation described in paragraph (1), including public hearings.
